entry.title: IDC VA79113D0054 (P00115) awarded to TRIWEST HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SERVICES FOR THE PATIENT CENTERED COMMUNITY CARE (PC3) CONTRACT FOR THE OFFICE OF COMMUNITY CARE (OCC).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
